name: Study Mix displays interleaved queue with flashcards
description: The Study Mix page loads an interleaved study queue containing flashcard items with question text, a type badge, and topic information.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Study Mix link in the sidebar
Verify the Study Mix page displays a study item with a question or prompt text, a progress indicator showing item count, and a type badge indicating Flashcard or Feynman Prompt
